message:
fix(discord,signal): embed char counting and related capability type correctness

Discord: validate_input_early() used str::len (byte count) for embed
character limits while invoke_send_message() used chars().count()
(character count). Multi-byte Unicode (emoji, CJK) caused inconsistent
validation — early check could reject valid content or pass oversized
content. Aligned all 6 embed field counters to chars().count().

Signal: OperationInfo related fields used operation IDs (e.g.
"signal.send_message") via OP_* constants in CapabilityId slots instead
of actual capability IDs (CAP_SEND/CAP_READ/CAP_ADMIN). Fixed all 6
related fields to use the correct capability constants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -393,7 +393,7 @@ pub fn operations_info() -> Vec<OperationInfo> {
                     "Do not mix phone numbers, usernames, and group IDs in the same request".into(),
                 ],
                 examples: Vec::new(),
-                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(OP_RECEIVE_MESSAGES)],
+                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(CAP_READ)],
             },
             rate_limit: None,
             requires_approval: Some(ApprovalMode::None),
@@ -440,7 +440,7 @@ pub fn operations_info() -> Vec<OperationInfo> {
                     "Messages are consumed on read; re-calling will not return the same messages".into(),
                 ],
                 examples: Vec::new(),
-                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(OP_SEND_MESSAGE)],
+                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(CAP_SEND)],
             },
             rate_limit: None,
             requires_approval: Some(ApprovalMode::None),

-                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(OP_GET_GROUP)],
+                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(CAP_READ)],
             },
             rate_limit: None,
             requires_approval: Some(ApprovalMode::None),

+                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(CAP_READ)],

                 ],
